name: Seafood Scallop Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the haddock and scallops to the skillet; cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
4. Stir in the lobster meat and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
5. Transfer the seafood mixture to a baking dish.
6. Top with the remaining butter or margarine, spreading it evenly over the top.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until the casserole is golden brown and bubbly.
8. Turn off the heat and let the casserole cool for 5 minutes before serving.
